I live in a small town in the countryside.
This month I am restoring an old cabinet.
My dogs sleep in the backyard every afternoon.
Right now they are barking at the mailman.
Hi Ana, I saw your photos in the group. I am Tom, from Canada. I restore old furniture too. Where do you live?
Hi Tom, nice to meet you. I live in a small town in the countryside, about forty thousand people. It is very peaceful.
That sounds wonderful. I grew up in Toronto, so I know the noise. What are you working on right now?
This month I am restoring an old wooden cabinet. I am not a professional. I am just very handy.
That is the best kind. And who is the dog in your photo? He looks like he owns the place.
That is Mel. She was a stray, and now she sleeps in the backyard all afternoon. I take care of two dogs.
Hi, I am Ana. I live in a small town in the countryside.
I take care of two dogs and an old house.
These days I am restoring an old cabinet.
What about you? Where do you live?
Sorry, could you say that again, please?

I lived in the city for almost twenty years, and honestly, I loved it at first. But the noise never stops. The traffic, the neighbors, the construction. One morning I was sitting in traffic for a whole hour and I thought, that is enough. So we moved away. Now I live in a small town with my wife and two cats, and it is completely peaceful. Do I miss the city? A little. I miss the restaurants, and I really miss my old friends. But at the moment I am fixing the roof and painting the kitchen, and I have never been happier.

Saturday is my favorite day. I always take the dogs for a long walk first thing in the morning, before it gets hot. Then I do my chores, which I do not love, but somebody has to do them. In the afternoon I usually work in the garden. These days I am planting vegetables, mostly tomatoes and lettuce, and I am learning as I go. My neighbors are very quiet people. We only really meet at the little market on Sunday morning, and that is perfect for me.

First, Tom introduces himself and says where he is from. Then Ana says where she lives and how peaceful the town is. Next, Ana says what she is restoring at home this month. After that, Ana tells him about her dog Mel, who was a stray. Finally, they discover they share the same hobby and agree to swap photos.

I love the silence here.
Both of my dogs were strays before I found them.

I take care of two dogs and an old house.
These days I am restoring an old wooden cabinet.
My street is so peaceful that I can hear the birds.
On Saturdays I do my chores and then I rest.
